elements.label: Description
elements.value: Medium fruit. Last tier where spawning is fairly common. Merges into Persimmon.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/orange.schema.json, set ct_orange_radius to {{ct_orange_radius}}]
Set Orange radius to {{ct_orange_radius}} pixels.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/orange.schema.json, set ct_orange_score to {{ct_orange_score}}]
Set Orange merge score to {{ct_orange_score}} points.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/orange.schema.json, set ct_orange_weight to {{ct_orange_weight}}]
Set Orange spawn weight to {{ct_orange_weight}}.
